rationale: The citing paper’s core design is an announcement-based event study of abnormal stock returns (Fama-French model), and the cited paper is also an announcement event-study paper on shareholder-value consequences, so it could plausibly be a methodological precedent. However, the substantive topics differ (branded app design vs. buyer–supplier contract/JV governance) and the provided evidence includes only a DOI match with no in-text citation context, so the pair cannot be safely dropped or confidently kept.
